title: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Adolescents - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Adolescents 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Deafness Fathers Men Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Women Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE DEER CREEK YOUTH RESIDENTIAL AND OUTPATIENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders from residential care to outpatient treatment and after care. Also provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. Eligibility: Youth with addiction and/or co-occurring mental health challenges Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 673-5119 Visit Website More Details MADRONA RECOVERY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a residential program offering co-occurring mental health, trauma, and substance use recovery services. Programming is centered around building skills in emotional regulation, resiliency, conflict resolution, and communication. 7000 SW Varns Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 749-0200 528 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIMROCK TRAILS TREATMENT SERVICES PRINEVILLE YOUTH RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential treatment for youth with substance use and mental health needs. Youth live in a coeducational setting for 50 days or longer. Focuses on building coping and life skills, preventing relapse, improving relationships, and managing emotions and stress. Youth receive individual counseling, attend daily group therapy, continue their education on site, and take part in daily chores, sports, and activities. Additional supports include access to a gym, weight room, rock climbing wall, equine therapy, and art therapy. 1333 NW 9th Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Ages 12-17 Hours: Main Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program: Staffed 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 447-2631 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRONA RECOVERY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT RIMROCK TRAILS TREATMENT SERVICES ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM
